description_long: This is a medium-sized, round bucket with a slightly tapered cylindrical shape, wider at the top and narrowing towards the base. The bucket is primarily a muted beige color with a darker, weathered rim and base, suggesting frequent use or exposure to the elements. A single, thick, gray bail handle is attached to the sides with round mounts, allowing for easy carrying. On one side, there is a decorative red-brown ribbon-like marking with partial text and a laurel motif, giving it a somewhat vintage or utilitarian look. The interior appears hollow and unfinished, consistent with a functional container for carrying liquids or loose materials. The surface finish is matte with subtle shading, and there are no visible reinforcements or a lid.
description: A beige, weathered bucket with a thick gray bail handle and red-brown decorative markings, featuring a matte finish and a hollow interior.
description_view_0: The bucket is seen from a slight angle, showing the handle attachment and a glimpse of the red-brown marking on the side.
description_view_1: The front view highlights the full bail handle and the decorative ribbon-like marking with partial text and laurel motif.
description_view_2: This side view shows the handle attachment and a partial view of the marking, with the bucket's tapering shape visible.
description_view_3: The rear view displays the plain back of the bucket, with no markings or handle details visible.
attribute_labeling_or_markings: red-brown ribbon with partial text and laurel motif
